question_text: Which of the following correctly lists properties that describe all waves?

options.label: A
options.text: They require a medium and travel in straight lines only

options.label: B
options.text: They have frequency, wavelength, and amplitude

options.label: C
options.text: They always travel at the same speed

options.label: D
options.text: They can only be seen with a microscope

explanation: All waves have frequency (how often they oscillate), wavelength (distance between repeats), and amplitude (size of vibration). However, not all waves need a medium, and they travel at different speeds depending on the medium.
